info.name: EduVerse API - Full Collection
info.description: EduVerse API - Full Collection with 22 module folders, 180+ requests. Covers Auth, Users, Campus, Departments, Programs, Semesters, Courses, Sections, Schedules, Enrollments, Assignments, Grades, Rubrics, Files, Attendance, Quizzes, Labs, Notifications, Messaging, Discussions, Announcements, and Community.

request.description: List users with pagination. The /users/search route has a known route ordering issue, so use the list endpoint with filters instead.

body.raw: {"courseId":1,"title":"Postman Test Assignment","description":"An assignment created from Postman","instructions":"Complete the tasks listed below","submissionType":"file","maxScore":100,"weight":15,"dueDate":"2026-06-15T23:59:59Z","availableFrom":"2026-06-01T00:00:00Z","lateSubmissionAllowed":true,"latePenaltyPercent":10,"maxFileSizeMb":10,"allowedFileTypes":"[\"pdf\",\"docx\",\"zip\"]","status":"published"}

  "questionText": "What is the time complexity of binary search?",
  "questionType": "mcq",
  "options": [
    "O(1)",
    "O(log n)",
    "O(n)",
    "O(n log n)"
  ],
  "correctAnswer": "O(log n)",
  "explanation": "Binary search divides the search space in half each iteration",

request.description: List all labs. Supports ?courseId=1&status=published&page=1&limit=20
Create a new lab. Roles: Instructor, TA, Admin
Get lab details with instructions
Update lab. Roles: Instructor, TA, Admin
Delete a lab. Roles: Instructor, Admin
Get all instructions for a lab
Add instruction to lab. Roles: Instructor, TA
Submit lab work. Role: Student only
Get student's own submission. Role: Student
List all submissions. Roles: Instructor, TA, Admin
Grade a submission. Roles: Instructor, TA
Mark student attendance. Roles: Instructor, TA
Get attendance records. Roles: Instructor, TA, Admin
List notifications. Supports ?type=announcement&priority=high&isRead=false&page=1&limit=20
Get count of unread notifications
Send notification to users. Roles: Admin, IT Admin

request.description: Soft-deletes a message for the current user only. Use DELETE /api/messages/{messageId}
Deletes a message for all participants. Only the sender can use this.

item.name: 💬 Messaging
item.description: WhatsApp-like real-time messaging. Supports direct conversations, group chats, file attachments, read receipts, delete-for-me, delete-for-everyone, and search. WebSocket: connect to /messaging namespace with JWT token.

body.raw: {"courseId": 1, "title": "Tips for Final Project - Data Structures", "description": "What data structures would you recommend for implementing the graph traversal module?"}
{"title": "Tips for Final Project - Data Structures & Algorithms", "description": "Updated: Including both data structures and algorithm choices for the graph module."}
{"messageText": "I recommend using an adjacency list for sparse graphs and a matrix for dense ones. BFS is optimal for shortest path."}
{"messageText": "Would a priority queue help with Dijkstras implementation?", "parentMessageId": 11}

item.name: 💭 Discussions
item.description: Course discussion forums. Create threads, post replies (flat and nested), pin/lock threads, mark answers, and endorse replies.

item.description: Course, department, and system-wide announcements with scheduling and targeting. Role-based filtering: Admin sees all, Instructor/TA sees their courses, Students see published announcements for enrolled courses.

item.description: Community forum posts, comments, reactions, and categories. All authenticated users can create posts and comments. Admins can manage categories. Instructors can pin/lock posts.
